name: search_cars
description: Search AS Cars inventory by car name. Call this whenever the user asks about any car. Never answer car availability or price without calling this first.

name.description: The car model name in ENGLISH only. Even if the user speaks Telugu or Hindi, always convert the car name to English before sending. Format: ilike.*<English model name>*. Examples: user says 'హోండా సిటీ' → ilike.*City*, user says 'స్విఫ్ట్' → ilike.*Swift*, user says 'క్రెటా' → ilike.*Creta*, user says 'Audi Q7' → ilike.*Q7*. Never send Telugu or Hindi script in this field.
